"Nick, this isn't funny!"

"I didn't say it was. But it was actually kind of fun being the smaller one for a change."

Nick closed his mouth like he had let something slip out. Judy eyed him curiously.

"Wait...Are you saying you liked me as an elephant?"

"Well," Nick admitted with his own blush. "It was certainly different than anything else I've ever experienced. And it was kind of cool to watch you slowly transform like that. And the night together...Yeah that was kind of fun."

Judy's blush intensified as she stared down at her feet, unable to meet Nick's eyes. "Do you...Want me to do it again?"

"I mean, I don't want to force you into anything, Judy."

"I didn't say forced. I'm kinda...Curious myself. Now that I know this is a legitimate thing, maybe I can stop by that shop and...Purchase a few goods to have some fun together. You know, once and a while. Maybe soon."

Nick's smile widened. "I could be game for that. How soon were you thinking?"

"Tonight, maybe?"

"Heh, eager much?"

"Kinda," Judy's toes curled. "I need to get home though. Get a change of clothes. And then we got work. But after our shift today, I'll stop by the shop and see...What I can find. Then meet back here, maybe?"

"Sounds like a plan," Nick said with his arms crossed. "Looking forward to it."

"Likewise..."

~

That whole day at the office, Nick and Judy both had a hard time meeting each other's eyes. They had a dirty little secret they were keeping and everyone in the precinct could tell that something had happened. No one was just quite sure what. Though Judy continued to work, she had a hard time focusing as she tried to imagine the exotic pleasures that awaited her that evening. Nick was also looking forward to what she could find at the shop.

The day finally ended and Nick raced home to try his paw in cooking. Just a little dinner to share in before their night together as he patiently watched the clock waiting for Judy to show up.

Just as the water boiled, there was a knock at his door. He casually leaned on the frame as he opened the way for Judy, dressed in less restrictive clothes this time and carrying a large wooden box.

"Hi," Nick said. "Whatcha got there?"

Judy was already blushing. "Oh, I just got back from the store. Spent a small fortune on this and other, um, elixirs. She apparently has a bunch for different species, and I just couldn't resist. Take a look."

Judy set the box down on the kitchen table and pulled out...
112134212411111.title: Back as a Bunny

1121342124111112.content:
Judy held up a bottle that was a different color and label than the elephant one. "I kinda wanted to try this one out, so we at least don't destroy your apartment by outgrowing it. But still be pretty big, you know?"

"Well, let's see here," Nick said as he took the blue elixir this time and noted the logo. "A hippo?"

"Yeah, I've kinda been remembering last night a little better. We had to stop before I got too big. I figured we could save the elephant for when we had proper space. Maybe book an elephant-sized hotel somewhere when I get my next paycheck."

He handed the bottle back. "Oh, fancy big spender there. First these little potions and now a hotel room."

"Well, I mean, I still have plenty of savings. Besides a new apartment, I can't think of anything to spend money on. And who knows? Maybe if we start to, um, like this arrangement of ours, we might be able to save living expenses in general in the future. Maybe."

"Why, Carrots. Are you asking to move into me?"

The bunny felt herself blush as she fiddled with the cork on the bottle. "I mean, it's still too early to even talk about that kind of thing. I get it. Right now we're just having fun. But if you ever want to make it official..."

"Tempting," Nick gave a sly smile. "Something to think about later. For now, I propose a toast to a fun evening."

"Yes," Judy's ears were completely red at this point. "A fun evening! One I'll hopefully remember this time."

"What did happen anyway?" Nick asked as he pulled out two wine glasses. "Did the shop keeper say anything?"

"I did ask. She explained to me that the first time is always a little intense, especially if you're going from one extreme to the other like I was. I was kind of suffering from sensory overload which simplified my thought process to base needs like food and...Intimacy. This time around, I should remember it better and be more aware of what's happening to me. And it should be easier with each elixir."

"Good to know," Nick replied as he poured himself some wine while Judy filled her glass up with the blue hippo potion. "I'll certainly be more helpful this time around now that I know you're into it."

"I'm looking forward to this," Judy smiled as she sipped down the new concoction.

Nick downed his own drink while he waited patiently for Judy to finish the elixir. The countdown had started and their evening was set, with no going back. Judy polished off her glass and smacked her lips.

"This one tastes like...Berries? It's making me feel a little intoxicated already but I don't seem any different otherwise."

"It was bit by bit the last night," Nick explained. "We can sit down to have dinner in the meantime. It took you a couple of hours before you were fully transformed."

"Really? Huh, I wonder what will happen first?"

Nick couldn't help with wonder that too as he kept a close eye on Judy for the first signs of any alterations. As it would so happen, the first change into a hippo would start with...
1121342124111112.title: The Hippo Elixir

choices: Nick drinks his own potion to get even smaller
Nick offers to feed Judy a ton of food to grow her bigger.
Nick suggests Judy drink an elephant elixir on top of the hippo one
11213421241111122.content:
As Nick served their dinner of pasta and salad, he did a double take as he glanced at the top of Judy's head.

"Hey, uh, Carrots? You're looking a bit smaller there."

"Smaller?" Judy asked as she looked down at herself. "That shouldn't be. Hippos are supposed to be big! I want to be big."

"I meant your ears, Carrots. They're shrinking down to match a hippos'."

"Oh."

Judy reached for the tips of her ears to find that she didn't have to strain herself too hard to hit the tops. Her ears were definitely shorter. If she focused, she could actually feel them recede into her head very, very slowly. They had already gone down about an inch and were getting smaller by the moment.

"So," said Nick as he began to munch on his dinner. "You want to be big, huh?"

"Huh?" Judy's dwindling ears suddenly turned red.

"Don't deny it, I just heard you say it. That's the reason why you picked out hippo and started with an elephant, isn't it? Secretly deep down, you like the thought of being the big one in the relationship, don't you?"

"What about you?" Judy asked.

"Don't try to turn this one on me, Carrots. I am perfectly willing to admit that there's something kinky about being the tiny one in bed for a change."

"I guess...," Judy muttered as she picked at her salad. "I've always been on the short side, even among rabbits. It's kinda...Thrilling to experience the opposite for a change, you know?"

"I know," Nick said. "Want to make it more interesting then?"

"What do you mean?"

What did Nick mean by that?
11213421241111122.title: It Starts with the Ears

112134212411111221.content:
"You want to feel big," Nick explained. "The problem is that my apartment can't handle it. Hippos get about as big as you were last night, right? That's a comfortable size for my building for. So, what if I was the one who got smaller?"

"Smaller?"

"Not too small, of course. Being a mouse to a hippo might be fun. But I was thinking something a little closer to home and familiar. A bunny, perhaps."

"A bunny?" Judy asked as she felt her ears shrink even more. "Nick are you saying you want to drink a potion for yourself?"

"Why not? Can't let you have all the fun, can I? I've always been kind of curious to know what it's like to be a rabbit."

Nick wandered over to the box Judy had bought with all the potions and fiddled around through the vials before picking out what he thought was the right one. It was hard to tell with all the labels what exactly did what. Nick raised the glass to Judy, who was stunned at the thought that she might to watch Nick transform into something as well. The idea kind of excited her...

"See you on the other side, fellow bunny."

He then gulped it all down. It was an orange concoction that tasted exactly like carrots, which Nick expected as he smacked as his lips. No going back now.

"Nick, you should read that bottle to make sur--Oof."

Judy clasped at her stomach as it began to rumble from the small amount of food she had already consumed. From under the dress she was wearing, she watched as her belly began to grow like it was filling with air from a deep breath. When she tried to exhale though, it wouldn't go back down. That's when it occurred to her that she was starting to get larger. And there was a gnawing hunger deep within her.

"Looking a little full there, Carrot," Nick chuckled as he noticed Judy's ears were half their usual size. "And your ears are coming along nicely too."

"Speak for yourself, long ears," Judy smirked back.

Nick's eye raised as he felt on the top of his head. His ears were always sort of large, but nowhere near the size of Judy's. As he felt around them he noticed that they were indeed longer than they had been a second ago. The potion was beginning to take effect. It wouldn't be long before he had a full set of matching bunny ears.

"Well, colored me surprised that it actually worked," he said. "I guess I won't be able to call you Carrots for much longer."

"Maybe, let me see that vial you drank."

"Huh? Why?"

"Because there's more than one kind of rabbit, Nick. Just like there's more than one kind of fox. I'm curious what of bunny you'll be."

Nick hadn't even considered that. There were so many species already, he hadn't given any thought about sub species or what these potions could turn you into. Nick handed Judy the vial as she looked it over, her ears were now complete miniatures of their former selves.

"Ah hah," she said. "It says here that kind of rabbit you'll turn into is..."
112134212411111221.title: Nick Becomes a Bunny

1121342124111112212.content:
"The kind of rabbit you'll turn into is...Oh my," said Judy as her dwindled ears reddened.

"What?" Nick asked, suddenly concerned. "What is it?"

Judy let out a nervous giggle. "Well, the good news is you're going to turn into a perfectly normal farm rabbit, just like me. The bad news is, um, you're going to end up more like me than I think you originally planned. This drink turns you into a female bunny."

"A female bunny," Nick gawked at the idea of a sudden sex change. "Do these potions actually work on gender like that?"

"I don't see why not and we're about to find out with you...Ooof."

Judy clasped at her dress again as they both watched her stomach began to expand again, this time passing to her hips as well. She was growing larger and meatier by the second, all while her stomach was letting out an angry growl.

"...I need to eat something before I completely lose it," Judy announced as she returned to the table and started shoveling her salad down her throat.

"Take it easy there, Carrots," said Nick as played with his new ears that were still growing up. "I'll get some more food from the kitchen."

While Judy ate what there was at the table, Nick excused himself to the kitchen before stopping to glance at his reflection in a nearby mirror. His ears were getting longer but there was no visible sign of any further changes. Yet.

He had been fully prepared to accept the alterations to his body in becoming a bunny, surely that wouldn't be too much different than being a fox. However, a change in gender was certainly leaving him more than a little disquieted. What would it be like to be a member of the fairer sex, even if it was only temporary? It wasn't something Nick had fully considered as he grabbed a tray of various fruits and vegetables to return to Judy. Though he was left wondering what the next change to his body might be with his ears getting larger.

When he arrived, he discovered Judy was going through her own metamorphosis in the form of...
1121342124111112212.title: A Feminine Touch

11213421241111122121.content:
Nick stopped in the doorway at the sight of Judy hunched over the table, her lower body already spilling over the seat of her chair. With every passing bite, it seemed like she had gotten that much wider and a little bit taller if she were to stand up. The clothes she was wearing looked much tighter but still hadn't shown any signs of ripping yet. But that wasn't all as she opened her mouth to consume the food. Nick noticed that her two buck teeth seemed to be spreading out further apart. Judy only stopped eating when she saw Nick approach her.

"Nick, it's working. I can feel it! My body. My teeth and...Is that a melon?"

Judy gestured to the small green melon Nick had on the plate of goodies he had come offering her.

"Give it here," Judy said beckoning Nick forward. "I want to try something."

Curiosity overtook him as Nick set down the melon on Judy's plate and watched her. She brought the large piece of fruit to her mouth and opened wide. Though it was far too large to fit in her mouth, Judy tried anyway, commanding her mouth to get larger and larger. Nick's eyes widened as her jaw seemed to unhinge itself though remained sturdily attached to her face. If anything, it was like her entire mouth was growing out, much like a hippos. It wasn't long before Judy's jaws could fit around the entire melon. She bit down hard and crushed the entire fruit between her teeth. Nick was stunned as her entire snout had swollen up from the process and didn't look like a rabbit's mouth at all anymore.

"How did you...?"

"I figured it out," Judy smirked. "The potion is the trigger to the changes but it's also a mental one. That's what the shop owner meant when she first sold me the elephant one. It was supposed to make me feel big. And the bigger I felt..."

"...The bigger you got," Nick finished as he recalled Judy had almost grown out of his apartment.

"So, all I had to do was imagine myself eating this melon like a hippo would and ta da, now I have a hippo mouth. Or the start of one."

Nick had to admit it was very strange to see Judy's face with a hippo's snout. Her mouth was so big that it flapped a lot whenever she spoke and her voice had gotten a little deeper. Judy sat up in her chair as she looked him up and down.

"You should try it!"

"Try what?" he asked.

"Imagining yourself transform. Come on, you gotta get into the mind of being a rabbit. A female bunny too!"

Nick gulped. It was a little strange to even consider all that as he looked down at his body. Unwittingly, just even thinking about it was starting to trigger the next change as his thoughts traveled to the idea of...
11213421241111122121.title: A Big Mouth

112134212411111221212.content:
Something about the way Judy had said female was enough of a trigger for Nick to think all about it. What would it be like to have a female body? Nick could only imagine it as a weird tingle ran through his torso.

He clasped at his racing heart as suddenly there was a bit more on his chest to grab than there usually was. In fact, his chest almost felt heavy, dare he say it. Nick looked down and gasped as he found with every deep breath he was taking, he saw two distinct shapes beneath his shirt start to grow a little bit bigger. That wasn't all that was starting to grow either.

Nick felt his knees bend inward as his hips started to flare out. There was a tightness in the seat of his pants as he glanced over and saw that his butt had started expanded to match his chest, albeit at a much faster rate. Bunnies were bottom heavy, after all.

Growing wasn't the only thing he was doing, however. The rest of his body felt lighter and thinner as his limbs slimmed down slightly from a less stocky build and more dainty in appearance. The biggest change felt like a kick in the groin, as Nick reached down distinctly less of himself down below the belt.

"It's gone!" Nick said in a much higher pitched voice. "Carrots, I think I'm..."

"Female?" Judy asked. "And a cute one too. How's it feel to take a walk on the other side of gender?"

"I'm...I'm a vixen now?" Nick asked, struggling to get his head around it. Or her head around it now. However this gender thing worked.

"Well, you won't be for too much longer," Judy said with a smirk on her large mouth. "Just like I won't be much of a rabbit for longer. I wonder which of us is going to change first?"

That was indeed a good question. While they had been speaking, Nick swore that Judy had grown a little bit bigger. But she certainly had a lot more growing to do in general, while Nick's own body was definitely a fox's besides the ears.

"Wanna race to find out?" Judy asked as she grabbed more fruit from the platter.

"Hah," replied Nick as she grabbed a carrot. "You're on!"
112134212411111221212.title: A Walk on the Other Side

choices: Judy has Nick take another elixir
Judy has Nick dress up as her
Judy has Nick stuff herself silly
1121342124111112212121.content:
Judy hid her sly smirk as she munched on fruit after fruit, going fast but not as fast as she could go. She was much more interested and watching Nick's gradual transformation into a full blown rabbit as the new female stuffed her face full of carrots.

As for Nick, her focus was more on winning.

The idea that she was now female was something that was too big of a mental adjustment that it was much easier to just stuff her face and not even think about it. Though Nick could feel the other changes being done to her body as she chewed on carrot after carrot. Her ears were already in place, long and floppy, but it was her tail that was next. Nick could feel it start to recede into her butt, going from fluffy and long to fuzzy and small like a bunny's. She could wiggle it around but didn't have much control beyond that.

Things got really strange when Nick could feel her mouth start to shift and change. She was used to sharp teeth her whole life and it was awkward to adjust to the fact that her chompers were getting smoother and less pronounced. Clawhauser practically squealed with joy and grabbed Nick by the paw. "Oh, thank you! We're going to have so much fun, I promise!"

And fun they did have.

Being at the mall, there were plenty of opportunities for them to do stuff and hang out together. Clawhauser showed Nick all his favorite stores for shopping and browsing various traditionally feminine goods, yet Clawhauser enjoyed them all the same. They visited various clothing stores and Nick discovered a few new outfits he could wear with his Judy disguise. They went to candle and bath stores for pampering tools. They even went to the nail salon to have their claws filed.

But the day was fast coming to an end and Nick realized it was getting late. He had spent the whole day as Judy and his real body within the suit was starting to feel a little cramped.

"Well," he said with the many acquired goods in his paws. "I had a wonderful time. Thanks, Clawhauser. I need to go home and get...Changed."

"Oh," his ears folded as he looked a little sad to hear that. "Okay, well I'm glad you had fun."

"For sure! Let's do this again sometime!"

And with that, Nick went on the bus that would take him back to his own apartment, leaving Clawhauser at. Nick sighed, the day spent with him hadn't revealed anything if Clawhauser was just looking for a friend or a romantic interest. But he truly did have fun with the big cheetah. He just really needed to get back to being himself for a change. Unfortunately, the good times were about to come to an end as Nick discovered...
1211113231.title: A Day with Clawhauser

choices: Clawhauser is acting weird around the real Judy
Nick decides to borrow a uniform from the real Judy and pose as her
Nick confronts Clawhauser directly about what happened
12111132312.content:
Nick did a double take as he looked down at the other side of the bus. Just when he was looking forward to going to his own home for some privacy, standing in the back of the bus was Clawhauser staring right back at him.

"Clawhauser," Nick groaned as he pushed his way up to him. "What are you doing?"

"I could ask you the same question," he replied. "This isn't the bus that you normally take to do home, Judy."

"What do you mean?"

"This bus takes you to the lower downtown area, a whole twenty blocks away from where you live. I thought you said you were going home."

"I am," Nick replied, realizing that he couldn't very well reveal he was actually going to his own apartment. "I was just...Taking a walk home. It's good exercise."

"Oh yeah?"

"Yeah," said Nick as he leapt up and pulled the chord to stop. "In fact, I better get running right now!"

Using Judy's slim body, Nick managed to slip his way out of the bus and ran along the sidewalk at a great speed. One good thing about being a rabbit was that they were fast and it gave Nick enough of a headstart to get away from Clawhauser as the bumbling cheetah lumbered out of the bus himself.

Nick turned the corner and immediately fiddled around the back of his neck for the switch and flipped it.

Pressed against the wall, Nick felt his entire body turn into soup again as it began to reshape itself back into his old foxy shape. He felt like taffy being stretched out as he grew taller and stretching out the dress he was wearing, his ears shrinking as well and becoming pointed again. He watched as his snout grew out and his tail got longer before he tugged at the lip of his face and pulled back the mask. He was back to being Nick the fox.

Nick climbed out of the Judy suit and folded it up with the remains of his dress before quickly slipping into his old clothes. Just as he finished getting changed, Clawhauser rounded the corner out of breath.

"Benji!" Nick said, faking surprise. "What can I do for you, bud?"

"I was just..."Clawhauser said between gulps of air. "...Did you see Judy, by chance?"

"Judy? Nope, haven't seen her."

"Rats. I lost her...Just when we were starting to have fun."

"Sounds more like she wanted to get away from you, bud. Being a bit clingy there, aren't you?"

Clawhauser scowled at Nick but didn't say anything more. The two parted on glares as Nick could take a bit of a breather himself. Maybe he was right and Clawhauser was being a bit too clingy with Judy, or who he perceived as Judy. On the other hand, Nick definitely did enjoy himself going out and about as Judy. The only issue was he may have ruined the dress he had bought with the quick return back to his normal self. Despite that, he was kind of eager to put the suit on again and see what else he could do with it.

The next day...
12111132312.title: Clingy Clawhauser

1212.content:
And with that, Stephanie pulled out a carrot.

Nick was surprised by the item the goat showed him. It’s maybe Judy’s favorite vegetable and food in general, but how a carrot could help him understand better his best friend?

“You seem perplexed Mr. Wilde,” the goat said.

“I mean… I don’t understand how this carrot can help me with my friend Judy” Nick admitted frankly.

“I see. However, this carrot isn’t a normal carrot. It’s a magic item I found in a mysterious forest and it has some extraordinary properties. It should enable you and Judy to understand each other like never before,” Stephanie explained with conviction.

Nick couldn’t believe what the goat was saying. He didn’t believe in magic anyway, but he could feel this shop and its objects had something special.
If the goat weren’t lying, this carrot could be an interesting experience for him and Judy.

“Okay, your ‘special’ carrot intrigues me! How much does it cost?” the fox asked.

“I offer you this item for free! I have the feeling this ware is more useful for you than in my shop.”

“Really? That’s so kind. Zootopia would be a better city with sellers like you!”

“How sweet you are! I hope you will be satisfied. Before leaving, I didn’t tell you how it works” added Stephanie.

The goat explained to the fox that he had to eat this carrot before going to bed while thinking of his best bunny friend.
The pleased fox then left the shop still curious about the strange object he was holding in his hand.
He followed step by step Stephanie’s instructions with the carrot and fell asleep.


**Beep Beep Beep Beep**

Nick was woken up by an unfamiliar alarm clock bell. He had the feeling his head was going to explode.
He slowly opened his eyes and turned off the alarm clock with his paw. Surprised, Nick realized he had gray fur on his arm.
Besides, it turned out that he wasn’t at his apartment: it was Judy’s.

Then everything came back to his mind: the strange shop, the magic carrot…
The fox didn’t understand, what was going on. Indeed, Stephanie hadn’t been really clear about the effects of her product yesterday.
He stood up, feeling smaller than usual.

“Judy, are you there?” Nick couldn’t help asking, surprised by his female voice that sounded a lot like his best friend’s one.

There was no response: Nick was alone in Judy’s apartment. He was completely lost.
“What the hell is going on,” he thought.

He looked for a mirror that he finally found in the bunny’s bathroom.
What he saw in the mirror froze him: he couldn’t see his own reflection but Judy’s one. He moved his body towards the mirror and Judy’s reflection perfectly mimicked his movements.

The former fox stayed in front of his new reflection for a long time, trying to understand the circumstances which led him to this inexplicable situation.
Stephanie’s words “It should enable you and Judy to understand each other like never before” were resonating in Nick’s mind.

“So, am I Judy right now?” he said out loud.

Then, he decided to…
1212.title: A mysterious carrot

choices: Himself (Nick's in two places at once somehow)
12123.content:
Considering Nick had went to sleep as a male fox and woken up as a female bunny, he was taking the situation extremely well. He supposed it had to do with the unspoken attraction he had to Judy. Being in her body was actually a little exciting. Being a former hustler, he had gotten used to the idea of acting and having to pretend to be someone else to open doors. While he never literally had to be someone else before, it wasn't much different than that. From an outsider's perspective, no one would be able to tell the difference that it was him in here. He could completely pose as Judy, he certainly knew her habits and quirks well enough from being up close to her all day.

Nick sat up for a moment, taking in the strange sensations and feelings that came with his new body.

For starters, his sense of smell was greatly reduced. He felt like he had a cold from how little scents he was picking up with his bunny nose. However, the ears more than made up for it in how they were able to pick up sounds from all over the apartment complex. He could actually hear one of Judy's neighbors singing in the shower all the way on the other side of the building, if he focused hard enough. There was also the matter of being in a female body.

While Judy was lacking in the chest department, she more than made up for in in the lower body which was mostly muscle. Nick felt light as he skipped across the floorboards effortlessly. The balance without his fox tail was different, but his body seemed to move naturally on his own.

"Thank goodness for small miracles," he said to himself as he looked in the mirror at Judy, still wearing her pajamas. "Well, I guess we just gotta start the day as normal and let whatever this is work itself out."

Worst case scenario, he could always go back to Stephanie's shop and have her solve things. It was their day off from work, so he had plenty of time to kill.

"I guess that means getting dressed first..."

Changing was a little awkward in that, though it was technically his own body, he wanted to give Judy as much privacy as he could. So, he closed his eyes when he removed his shirt and pants, fiddling around the dresser for some jeans and a simple shirt he had seen Judy wear on multiple occasions. When he opened his eyes again, she was standing there dressed and ready for the day.

"...I'm not looking forward to having to go to the bathroom," he muttered to himself. "Well, Judy Hopps, we're ready to pretend to be you for the day, aren't we? Shall we head to Stephanie's Shop first and get more details on what's happened to us?"

And with that he nodded to himself and started for the door, but not before there was a knock. Nick frowned, he didn't know Judy was expecting company. But this would be a good opportunity to put on his acting chops and pretend to be her if it was someone who required it. As it happened, the person(s) knocking at the door happened to be...
12123.title: Judy for a Day

122.content:
“Well there are plenty things all about this shop that can do that,” Stephanie laughs

“Yea I’m sure of it, but I mean REALLY impress someone,” Nick presses the matter to try to get her to understand. His explanation is met with a face of pondering, Stephanie may have something after all.

Her face lights up and if this were an old cartoon, there’d be a lightbulb above her head. “I’ve got what you need, come back here,” she beckons Nick and then wanders off to the back of the store, where customers aren’t allowed.

Once Nick gets around the corner, Stephanie pulls him close, grabs his shirt and looks him dead in the eye before whispering, “What I’m about to show you, you can’t let anyone else know, got it?” Nick gives a quick, terrified and wide-eyed nod.Then, promptly letting him go, she turns to face a wall with a keypad. She makes Nick turn around so he doesn’t see the code.

Nick heard a bunch of mechanical noises and things moving behind him. He really wants to turn around but doesn’t want to go against Stephanie’s wishes.

“Ok, you can turn around now,” she says

When Nick spins around he’s greeted with a large white wall that holds a kajillion of devices that look straight up out of spy movies. Some look like guns, some look like ray guns, there’s remotes, switches, and even buttons. Every device has a title above it which displays the function of the device. Some notable ones he saw were shrink ray and a transformation remote.

Stephanie speaks, interrupting Nicks moment of awe, “So, take your pick!”

Nick quickly straightens up and switches back to his professional face. He lets his eyes wander the wall before finally grabbing the.......
122.title: A way to impress a certain someone

1221.content:
"Is this all legit?" Nick found himself asking as he grabbed the first thing his eyes caught. "A shrink ray?"

"Yup! You doubt me?"

Somehow he didn't. You didn't just pull someone to the side and reveal a secret compartment behind a locked door without the thing it protected having some sort of value or hidden agenda. But come on. A shrink ray? What was this, a science fiction movie?

"It's just a little hard to believe," Nick explained, trying not to offend the goat. "I mean, I know Zootopia is an advanced city and all. But I don't quite think we're there yet in terms of technology."

"Mm, true! But who says something like this is from the city?"

Nick couldn't help but wonder what Stephanie meant by that before she shooed him along with a wave of her hooves.

"I can see you need a demonstration though," continued the goat as she raised both of her arms. "Go on then. Fire away! Make me as small as you'd like. Then you'll see the truth."

Nick raised an eye. It was common practice for any sort of salesmammal to put their money where their mouth was in terms of the product they were selling. But if this ray gun was legit, like Nick was starting to suspect it was, then the goat was putting a lot of faith in him with her great height. She was bigger than Bogo, who was already around eight feet while Nick stood at a measly three feet in comparison. But she was also quite insistent with her staring down at Nick, encouraging him to go through with it.

"Alright," Nick finally relented. "Let's see if this works..."

Without another beat, he pulled the trigger and a blast of red light rocketed from the gun and struck Stephanie right in the torso. Despite looking quite violent, the goat let out a slight giggle as she began to descend towards the floor.

Nick was in awe as he continued holding down the trigger as the once titanic sized goat was now getting smaller and smaller before his very eyes. She battled with her pants before just giving up and letting them drop to the floor. Her red sweater was the only thing covering her now as she dropped to half her height and was quickly approaching Nick's own size before the fox realized what he was doing and let off his finger on the trigger.

"Oh my," Stephanie cried as she wobbled into place with a shirt that was more like a dress on her stunted self. "That was quite the drop! I haven't been at this size in quite some time..."

"What?" Nick asked. "You mean it actually worked? And you've been shrunk before?"

"Of course, my boy. You don't think I'm naturally that tall, do you? I just happened to be in a giant mood. Size is relative, after all. And, as you can see, the ray only works on organic material, namely people. Now that I've proven to you that my product is, in fact, 'legit,' are you still interested in purchasing it?"

Nick was left stunned. He had really just shrunk someone to half of their size with a shrink ray. He suddenly felt the power in his paws. What he could do with this thing. The people he could impress...

"...Yes," he finally found his normally witty tongue again. "Very interested."

"Perfect! And may I ask who is its intended target?"

Nick thought for a moment. Who was her trying to impress? The thought even occurred that Nick could just blast Stephanie till she was mouse sized and make off with all her other gadgets. But he wasn't that kind of fox, was he?

Nick's target with the shrink ray would be...
1221.title: The Shrink Ray!

123.content:
“See, what I'm looking for is something which allows me to go unnoticed… for a surprise for a friend.”

Nick couldn’t actually tell the goat his real reasons. Indeed, Chief Bogo assigned Judy and him a new secret case regarding a drug gang in Zootopia. This case had to be resolved quickly because this gang was selling a new dangerous drug containing toxins of night howlers. Its spreading through Zootopia was dangerous for the safety of the city.
The fox and his bunny partner needed a disguise to infiltrate the gang and this shop could be helpful.

“To go unnoticed,” the goat repeated perplexed, “So, you want people to not recognize you?”

“Um… yes, exactly,” the fox replied.

“I think I have many items which correspond with your request,” Stephanie said excitedly.

She then went into the back shop to look for some interesting wares for the fox.

Nick enjoyed this moment alone to get a better view of the room.
He had never seen such a mysterious shop in Zootopia. There were many strange objects and antiques stored on old shelves that barely stood.
Even with the mess inside the shop, the items seemed to be harmoniously categorized.

The goat came out of the back room and showed him…
123.title: A tool for a special mission

1231.content:
The goat came out of the back room and showed him an old watch but still in good condition.
The item wasn’t made by a luxury brand but appeared to be valuable.

“I think I can still be recognized with a watch,” said Nick with sarcasm.

“If only you knew its properties, you wouldn’t say that,” the goat answered with a mysterious tone.

“Try convincing me,” the fox replied, skeptical.

“Ok, Mr. Wilde. This watch has three crowns: one to change time, another for the chronometer, and the last one is… very special!” Stephanie said excitedly.

She explained to her fox customer that the watch allowed the owner to turn into a ghost by pressing the third crown. The user could therefore enjoy a ghost’s abilities like taking over someone’s body or turning invisible.

Nick was doubtful concerning Stephanie’s item. However, if she were telling the truth, this watch would be very useful for the investigation and make his life more interesting.
Indeed, he could become whoever he wanted.

“You are really persuasive,” the fox said.

“It’s my job after all. And to be more convincing, I offer you this watch for free,” replied Stephanie, laughing.

Nick was pleased with his good deal. He knew he would come back to this shop someday.
He then left and decided to try the watch and its ghost powers on…
1231.title: An old watch

choices: Enjoy the situation and pretend to be Clawhauser
12312.content:
Nick was walking cheerfully towards the Zootopia Police Department. He was looking forward to trying out his new watch.
He went inside the ZPD and saw Clawhauser. The cheetah was, as always, savoring his favorite donuts behind the reception desk.

“Clawhauser would be a perfect first test subject,” said Nick to himself.
Testing the watch involved some risks, but the fox couldn’t wait to see the effects described earlier by Stephanie.
He walked over to the cheetah’s desk and said:

“Hey Ben, how are you doing? I need to talk with you in private about… an investigation. Do you mind coming with me to my office?”

“Hello Nick, everything is fine! It doesn’t bother me at all as there hasn’t been much activity since this morning. By the way, Judy was looking for you 10 minutes ago,” replied Clawhauser.

“Ok, thanks for the information.”

The cheetah followed his fox colleague toward Nick and Judy’s office. The bunny wasn’t luckily there, allowing Nick to try his watch on Clawhauser without kindling ZPD officers’ attention.
When Benjamin had his back turned to Nick, the fox took the opportunity and instantly pressed the third crown of the watch. As Stephanie predicted, Nick turned into a ghost.

“What the hell is going on? Nick, where have you been?” the cheetah said, surprised.

The fox was technically still in front of Clawhauser but invisible for his eyes.
“Yes, it worked,” thought Nick amazed, “I can now try out the most intriguing feature of the watch.”

He then wondered how the body possession power worked when Clawhauser went suddenly through Nick’s ghost form.
Everything went black.

When the fox reopened his eyes, he was laying on the floor, Judy next to him. She asked worriedly:

“Benjamin, are you okay? I saw you pass out.”

“Benjamin?” repeated Nick, astonished by his current voice.

“Are you alright Ben? Do you want me to call an ambulance?” replied Judy.

The fox came around and gradually understood the situation. He stood up and reassured the bunny, then promptly headed for the male bathroom.

He gazed at his reflection in the mirror: he was inside Benjamin Clawhauser’s body.
Dumbfounded by the situation, Nick decided to …
12312.title: A ghost experiment on Clawhauser

13.content:
The wide cheetah did not usually feel this way, but this place, so cramped and tightly packed with shelved made him feel very self conscious about his size.
He wondered around, trying to put a finger on why this particular shop called his attention.
Stephanie was a bit amused by his demeanor so she asked from across the counter
"Hello there, honey. How can I help you today?"
She looked very odd, her weird clothing, the jewelry adorning her, and over all her huge size, she was even bigger than Clawhauser. He was not one to judge, but all of these things created an unnerving aura around her.
"I was just... looking for a gift..." he said nervously "It's for someone special..."
"Sorry if this comes off as rude dear, but... do you feel uncomfortable in your own body?" She asked "Or is it that you want to be more attractive to this special person?"
"Well... yeah... you're kinda right... I want to impress him but... I don't think I'm quite his type."
"Say no more, I have just what you're looking for! So do tell... What is it about you that you want to change?"
Clawhauser answered...
13.title: Enter Clawhauser

132.content:
Clawhauser answered "My weight... "
"Oh honey, you and a thousand others. What's wrong with your weight anyway?" she inquired in a deadpan tone.
Clawhauser paused for a second, not sure if she was mocking him. But he decided to answer anyway.
"Well... It's just that... "
132.title: My weight

choices: His clothes quickly began feeling tight
He met someone on the way
1322.content:
"It's just that I'm too thin... Oh, I know, I know, I'm not exactly skinny, but he... he's more into elephants and rhinos... I jus..."
At that point Stephanie interrupted him. "Don't worry dear, I understand more than you think."
She took a trinker from behind the counter, a shiny golden earring, and put in in Clawhauser's paw.

"What's this?" he asked confused.
"an earring, wear it and I'm certain you will impress that person. Consider it... a good luck charm of sorts."
Her answer sounded a bit cryptic and the cheetah was clearly not convinced.
"Tell you what honey, take it now, and you can pay me later only if you're satisfied with the result."
"Oh...Okay... Thank you... Should I leave you my name or something?"
"Don't worry dear, a cute face like yours is hard to forget. Good luck."

She waved him goodbye and he left a bit weirded out. But whatever, it was free stuff, and he had to admit, it looked rather cute.
So he put the single earring on his right ear and made his way home.
On his way something happened.
1322.title: I'm too thin

15.content: The city was quite large and had plenty of mammals out there who might happen upon Stephanie's humble store. After all, Zootopia was the home to mammals of all shapes and sizes. Who was it that had wandered in?
15.title: Other Characters

choices: She seeks to start a completely new life
She seeks to return to power and glory
152.content:
Dawn Bellwether hadn't had the easiest time getting out of jail. Luckily, her degree in law hadn't gone to waste as she was able to work with her lawyer to minimize the time spent in jail for her actions, coupled with some suggestive ideas that she had been manipulated into the role. Playing the meek little sheep had it's advantages sometimes. Her time spent in jail had been reduced to two years, but that had been a very long two years indeed. Long enough to reform, perhaps?

Dawn wasn't quite sure yet what she was feeling or what she was seeking as she entered the store of Stephanie. She was, however, taken aback by the goat of considerable size. Far bigger than any normal goat had a right to be, and Bellwether had been around a lot of goats in her time. She stood back, dumbfounded for a time while Stephanie just chuckled and looked down at the awestruck little sheep.

"Oh, hello there," Stephanie said as she leaned over to greet the sheep. "Welcome to my little store. I'm Stephanie! How can I help you?"

Dawn suddenly remembered herself. Since the Nighthowler incident, she hadn't been introducing herself as Dawn Bellwether. After all, the whole city somewhat hated her guts at this point.

"Uh, hi. I'm Luna...Luna Fairweather. I must confess, I've never seen this store before."

"Well, hello Luna. This is a very special store, indeed. This is a shop where your deepest wish can be fulfilled. So, what brings you here?"

Dawn laughed as the cynism took over. "My deepest wish?"

"No matter how big or small!"

Dawn still didn't quite believe the giant goat. Still, this was a strange store. Dawn decided to humor the giantess and think for a moment before answering Stephanie.

"Very well, my deepest wish is..."
152.title: Enter Bellwether

1521.content:
"...I'd like revenge on a certain someone that ruined my life," Dawn growled a little bit.

"Oh my," said Stephanie slightly surprised with that response. "Well, that's certainly a bit more darker than the usual requests I get. But I can understand the need for revenge if you were harmed by someone. Of course, I hate resorting to violence so perhaps we can seek a remedy to that which doesn't involve that, maybe?"

Dawn gritted her teeth but calmed herself. Expressing the amount of rage that had been building up inside her for two years was a sure way to end up back in prison. As much as she wanted revenge on a certain Judy Hopps, she needed to pretend to be normal. For now. Especially since it sounded like this goat had a solution to getting that vengeance.

"You're right," Dawn admitted, crossing her hooves. "Violence isn't the answer. But what did you have in mind as a replacement?"

"Oh, I can think of many things you could use to get the advantage against this person who's wronged you. All that won't harm the person in question but introduce some...Humility, that's a good word."

Dawn reframed from rolling her eyes. She had a lot more on her mind than having Judy Hopps get a lesson in humility. She'd make that rabbit rue the day she ever crossed her. She was just untouchable since she was a police officer and Bellwether had absolutely no power. If she did anything illegal, she'd just be arrested again.

"It has to be subtle," Dawn explained.

"Subtlety is my middle name! Let's see..."

Stephanie ducked to explore some of her items that would be useful for getting a little revenge, completely unaware of who the item would be for and what its true intended use would be. Stephanie decided to offer something to Dawn that would...
1521.title: The Revenge of Bellwether

15211.content:
"Now then," said Stephanie as she had a thought. "You wanted a little revenge on a certain someone. Completely understandable. But what if I said that you could have a little revenge?"

"...I'm not sure I follow," admitted Bellwether.

"Have you ever heard of a shrinking potion then?"

Dawn huffed a laugh. "I mean, yeah. In make believe stories."

"Of course. But what if I could assure you that a shrinking potion is a very real thing?"

With that, Stephanie produced a small bottle and placed it gently in front of Bellwether. It had a swirling blue liquid in it that almost seemed to glitter as Stephanie gestured to it.

"Go on, have a lick. Just one a small dip."

Bellwether scowled but unpopped the cork on the bottle. She was already very much on the small side when it came to sheep, standing at about 2'6. So, the idea of getting even smaller than that wasn't exactly appealing to her, not that she actually believed this crazy goat for a minute. But still, she obeyed and dipped her hoof into the vial, collecting a bead of the blue liquid and licking it. It tasted like absolutely nothing though shortly after Bellwether swallowed, she was overcome by a strange sense of vertigo. That was strange. Was the counter a little higher than she remembered it being? And why did her clothes suddenly feel a little loose on her? That was when she realized that she had shrunk about an inch shorter down to 2'5.

"...No way," she said, looking down at the mysterious blue liquid.

"Way!" replied Stephanie. "Don't worry though. The effects wear off in about a day, maybe sooner. There's more too!"

Stephanie reached down under the counter and pulled out a few items of interest.

"There's this shrink ray," Stephanie explained, holding up a ray gun. "It fires a ray of light that shrinks any part of someone the longer they stay in it. Or if you can get the whole person in the beam, it will shrink them completely. Doesn't work on clothes though. And there's this!"

Stephanie held up what looked like a normal pair of watches.

"These watches sync up to each other. If you wear the control watch, you can control the other wearer's size with a push of a button. Oh! And check this out!"

Stephanie held up two sticks of chalk, one orange and one blue.

"This is portal chalk. Now, you're supposed to use it to create portals of equal size by drawing a pair of circles on any surface. But if I've discovered that if you make one circle smaller than the other, what passes through, depending on its direction, changes size! Neat, huh?"

Stephanie put all the items down on the counter and looked down at Bellwether.

"So, do any of these interest you? I can always look for more in the back."

Bellwether swallowed, still mentally adjusting to the fact that she had genuinely shrunk an inch in height. And now she was being offered to achieve her revenge on the rabbit that had ruined her life by means of bringing her down to size. Literally, in this case. The only question was how to go back it as an evil grin spread across Bellwether's face. The tool she most preferred to take care of Hopps would be to use...
15211.title: Shrinking Judy Hopps

152114.content:
"I'll take the chalk," said Bellwether. "I'm rather curious about it's properties."

"A very wise choice! If it all doesn't work on, then you can just use it for its intended purpose, after all."

"Exactly my thinking..."

Bellwether then quietly paid for her purchase before thanking the giant goat and leaving to consider her plans. In order for the chalk to work, she was going to have to get up close and personal with Judy Hopps. Preferably when she was alone. She just had to insert herself into Judy's schedule discretely. Luckily, Bellwether still had a few contacts within the ZPD. None of them would do anything that would risk losing their jobs, of course. But if her request was so innocent that no one would suspect any wrong doing.

Dawn reached out to the most trustworthy of the bunch and ordered them to take the orange chalk piece and draw a circle with a radius precisely of three feet in one of the ZPD's supply closets. Then leave the chalk on the floor.

Bellwether handed off the chalk and waited for about an hour before facing the brick side of the building with her own blue chalk stick.

"Okay then," she whispered to herself. "Let's see if this works or not."

Measuring precisely, Bellwether drew out the circle on the wall. As soon as the lines connected, the empty space within the circle suddenly emitted a blue light before changing into the vision of a dark storage room. Curious, Bellwether stepped on through and found herself in the downstairs supply closet in the ZPD precinct one building.

"Amazing!" she said as she looked around and picked up the orange chalk left on the floor. "Well, that was test one. Now for test two..."

She covered up the hole left by the portals by quietly moving a few boxes in front of it, she didn't want to get ride of her only escape route, after all. When that was done, Bellwether took the orange chalk and drew up a rather large circle on the wall, not much longer than the one she walked in through. No portal opened yet though. Not until Dawn drew a much smaller blue portal next to her, just large enough to fit her hoof through. Instantly, both portals activated.

Bellwether peaked through the tinier portal and saw on the other side a miniature version of the storage closet she was standing in. As she reached her hoof inside, she was taken aback as her hoof appeared through the orange portal only massive in size.

"Excellent," she said aloud. "It works!"

Unfortunately, she wasn't able to test further than that because as soon as she pulled her hoof back through, the door to the closet began to jiggle. Dawn wasn't even given the time to hide herself as in walked...
152114.title: Thinking with Portals

choices: Bellwether convinces Nick to help her in exchange to return him to size
Nick manages to break free and escape
1521142.content:
A rather sly looking fox stepped into the storage room. Bellwether instantly scowled as she had seen this particular fox before. While it wasn't Judy Hopps, this mammal also was responsible for ruining her life.

"Well, well, well," said Nick Wilde as he shut the door behind him. "What have we here? Breaking and entering into a police station of all things? That's a new one, Smellwether."

"Bellwether," Dawn sharply corrected him.

"Uh huh. And what are you doing here, I wonder?"

"Getting my revenge! You and that stupid little bunny ruined my life!"

"Please. You ruined it yourself with your evil little plot. And looks like you're without your little ram goons this time to pummel us around. So, what's to stop me from arresting you here and now? You're just a tiny sheep all here on your own."

"Not with this!" Bellwether replied, holding up the chalk pieces in her hooves.

"Chalk? And what is that supposed to do?"

"I'll show you. Take a look on your right!"

Nick glanced over to the wall where the portal was. Apparently, he hadn't even noticed the soft orange glow nor why it appeared like there was a massive Bellwether staring back at him from the other side.

Bellwether reached her hoof in through the blue portal and grabbed the tiny Nick inside. Just as she did this, a massive arm came through the orange portal and grabbed hold of Nick. He didn't even have time to react as he was suddenly yanked through and brought before the biggest sheep he had ever seen as she held him up with one hoof.

"Now then," Bellwether said with a booming voice. "Who's the tiny sheep now, shrimp?"

Nick glanced around the room. It was the same storage room as before only way bigger this time. Wait a minute...Had Bellwether shrunk him somehow using whatever that weird portal? Nick was normally around three feet tall but now he was closer to six inches tall! The portal had cut his size down to 1/6th of what he normally was.

Bellwether laughed evilly. The fox was small enough that she could crush him if she really wanted to. Or maybe she could use him. Or better yet shrink him down even more so he'd be small enough to fit into her pocket instead of being doll-sized like he was. Or maybe Nick would have plans of his own and try to escape?

What happened next?
1521142.title: The Shrunken Fox

15213.content:
While Stephanie was looking for an item that would transform Dawn in some way, the sheep was fascinated by the goat’s shop. And more precisely, the enthralling wares that were stored around.

Stephanie finally found an object that could satisfy Dawn’s revenge and showed her …
15213.title: Transform Dawn in some way

152131.content:
Stephanie finally found an object that could satisfy Dawn’s revenge and showed her a necklace.

Dawn stayed silent, wondering what was the connection between her revenge and this necklace.

The goat didn’t let Dawn any time to ask some question and said:
“I know this necklace intrigues you. And there are many reasons to be fascinated by this item. Indeed, this isn’t an ordinary piece of jewelry as it has some incredible features.”

To convince more the sheep, Stephanie spelled out the main feature of the necklace. Wearing the piece of jewelry allows becoming whoever in Zootopia. Indeed, the item creates a strong link between the user and the target person’s body, which becomes a host for the necklace wearer’s mind.

Dawn didn’t expect to find such a perfect object for her revenge. Indeed, she could turn into Judy’s friends or close family members and so, messed up Judy’s life. She could even become Judy at wish.

“So, all I have to do is wearing this necklace while thinking about the person I want to turn into?” the sheep asked.

“Exactly! Don’t forget the effects are not always immediate. I give you a one-week free trial and then, if you are satisfied, we can haggle over a price,” replied Stephanie.

Dawn Bellwether left the shop and decided to use the necklace to turn into …
152131.title: A necklace

1521311.content:
Dawn Bellwether left the shop and decided to use the necklace to turn into Bonnie Hopps.

It was a mischievous plan, but she definitely wanted to punish Judy. She was the one who screwed up her life and ruined her chance to get revenge against the predators two years ago.
By becoming her mother, she could make Judy’s life hell.

There was also that damn fox, but she could punish him later.

Dawn wore the piece of jewelry the whole day, waiting for the effects of the necklace that never happened.
Disappointed, she went to bed and fell asleep.

She woke up the next day with odd feelings around her body and realized someone was sleeping next to her: it was a male bunny.
“Did it seriously work?” she thought excitedly.

Dawn then sat up on the bed and looked down at her new body. It was weird for her to have grey fur instead of her white wool.
She was excited with all the new sensations that were coming with her bunny body.
The most satisfying thing was her new rabbit ears. Unlike her former body, she could pick up so many sounds: from the small draft to the sound of the leak with the faucet.

The new Bonnie Hopps headed for the bathroom and locked the door.
She stayed silent in front of her new reflection in the mirror, and couldn’t believe yet that this situation was real.
Dawn used Bonnie’s paws to feel her bunny face and ears and enjoyed every part of a current body.
She looked at the reflection again and grinned evilly, which was very unfamiliar on Bonnie’s kind face.

“Judy Hopps, my revenge is going to be terrible,” the former sheep said out loud, with a disturbing voice.

She then came out of the bathroom and decided to…
1521311.title: Bonnie Hopps

choices: Go to sleep with the amulet on, try again when she's more prepared
Try to get familiar with Bonnie's life
Try to switch into someone else's body now
15213112.content:
Of course, there was more to being a bunny that just looking like one. While Dawn was busy taking in all the strange new sensations of being a rabbit, she was overcome by a weird urge as Bonnie's husband stirred in the bed.

"Bon?" asked the rabbit as he groaned awake. "Everything okay?"

Now, this rabbit wasn't exactly the most attractive bunny Dawn had ever seen. Though she was technically a sheep in a rabbit's body, even if she was all rabbit she'd probably have to admit that Bonnie's husband wasn't exactly eye candy. But that didn't matter to biology for as soon as the rabbit sat up shirtless in bed, Dawn was overwhelmed by the desire to pounce on him and make love.

"Huh?" the rabbit asked as he was suddenly overtaken by a passionate kiss. "Oh, we're doing this right now? Well, alright."

Dawn couldn't remember the last time she had been "together" with someone, even without her prison time it had certainly been a few years. With her new body too, it was all so strange and exotic. Bonnie's husband certainly wasn't the most energetic or passionate lover, but he did care for his wife very deeply and there was an odd familiarity with it. Even though Dawn didn't even know the name of the rabbit on top of her, she was enjoying every moment of it.

By the time they were done, the sun was completely up and there were other sounds throughout the Hopps house. No doubt the other inhabitants, Dawn guessed that Judy would have siblings being from a rabbit family. Bonnie's husband had passed out shortly after they had finished and Dawn was left with her own thoughts on the other side of the bed. What had come over her there, exactly? She was in this body for revenge and yet the biological urges of being a rabbit had thwarted that plan almost instantly.

"I'll have to be more careful," Dawn whispered to herself. "I'm not myself anymore. I need to get used to this body so I can avoid any surprises..."

Dawn patted the amulet which still hung around her neck. Somehow it had ended up on Bonnie's body, even though Dawn had been the one to wear it when she fell asleep. Dawn knew that if she were to wear it again while sleeping, she'd reverted back to her old self. What happened to her old body while she was in this one, she wondered? She clutched it, knowing she needed a plan if she wanted to get her vengeance on Judy Hopps. Dawn decided to...
15213112.title: A Bunny's Urges

choices: Take over a friend's body for a test
Do some research on Judy's family
152131121.content:
Dawn thought for a while and realized something as her "husband" stirred again. If this was to be her plan of attack against Judy Hopps, then she was going to have to come at it more prepared. Not even five minutes into having her new body and she had already fallen victim to the urges of a bunny. There was no telling what was in store for her, after all. What was she going to do if she suddenly had to remember someone important in Judy's family? She needed to be more prepared rather than just jump right in. That was her method, after all. The patient manipulator who didn't just rush things. Being hasty was what got her caught the last time, after all.

With that, Dawn closed her eyes and went back to sleep.

She woke up only a few minutes, this time back in her crummy little apartment in Zootopia. And back in her old sheep's body. Dawn patted her body up and down and breathed a sigh of relief. Though she was back in her own body, there was a strange sensation of disappointment. Like there was a whole other life Bellwether was missing out there. Though she had other priorities on her mind to contend with.

"Okay," Dawn said, sitting up in bed. "So, we know it works. But now we need to figure out what we can do with this little gift..."

Dawn still didn't completely know how it worked either. Did her real body just lay here motionless while she was off controlling Bonnie? That might be worth experimenting first before she did anything else. What happened to Bonnie too when she was inside her? It didn't appear that Bonnie had been in her old body.

Then again, perhaps the first thing she could do was research this Bonnie and Judy's family in general, for that matter. Study up so that she wouldn't raise suspicion.

The first thing Dawn would do was...
152131121.title: Getting More Prepared

info.brief_description: Come join the inhabitants of Zootopia as they transform in strange and interesting ways!
info.description:
In the lesser known parts of Zootopia there exists a small store owned by the most curious goat named Stephanie who has many wondrous things for sale, from magical items, to mysterious potions, to scientific marvels. If you're brave enough to enter her shop, you may find that what your heart desire's is a little bit of change in your life. And change will certainly happen, as one of the characters of the Zootopia movie plot stumbles on in, perhaps on accident or perhaps seeking a different perspective in the world.

Only you can say!

The primary focus will be on Nick and Judy, but please include other characters if you'd like! The only real rules are don't end the story and try to write chapters that aren't just one or two sentences, unless they're choice chapters, of course! And try to keep it in character as best you can.

Any sort of fetish stuff goes, from inflation, transformation, shrinking, growing, to anything in between! Be creative and have fun!
